arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk delivered pointed barb to Aston Villa star after penalty appeal
arts.sum: Liverpool beat Aston Villa 2-0 at Anfield to extend their lead at the top of the Premier League, but their opponents saw a late penalty appeal turned down by the referee

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy trying to ‘make things better’ at Manchester United
arts.sum: The interim boss is taking charge of one last match at home to Leicester on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy sends stern warning to Ruben Amorim with no funds for new Man Utd boss
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy has underlined the challenge that faces Ruben Amorim at Manchester United with the incoming manager set to be hampered by a lack of funds in the transfer market

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim set for job talks with Ruud van Nistelrooy as Man Utd legend gets key backing
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim will begin life as Manchester United's new manager on Monday and his first task will be to decide the future of caretaker boss and ex-Red Devils striker Ruud van Nistelrooy

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy is hopeful Ruben Amorim will keep him on at Manchester United - as interim boss prepares to meet incoming Portuguese coach for first time
arts.sum: Van Nistelrooy, whose two-week spell as interim manager will finish against Leicester City on Sunday, wants to continue in the assistant's role that he enjoyed under Erik ten Hag.

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk mocks opponent as Liverpool captain and ex Celtic star left mortified by Aston Villa penalty shout
arts.sum: Liverpool opened up a five point lead at the top of the Premier League with a 2-0 victory against Aston Villa at Anfield.

arts.ttl: What Virgil van Dijk said to mock Pau Torres after he dived to try and win a penalty at Liverpool
arts.sum: Liverpool won against Aston Villa to keep themselves top going into the international break but not before Virgil van Dijk once again showed why the...

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim has already found solution to major issue pointed out by Ruud van Nistelrooy
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy has recognised Manchester United's poor record in front of goal as an issue that needs to be resolved by Ruben Amorim - which is something he's addressed before
